title: Deano's Origin Modifications
description: dependency made by me (hihihi :3) for the Deano's Origins mod made by Deano7497 (go look at him this mod won't work without it and his mod wont work without this one lol)
body: A dependency for Deano's Origins mod new update (that is literally it). The mod basically just adds new items for the origin mod. If you somehow get this mod to work without Deano's Origins you won't even be able to use the weapons outside of creative since most of the weapons only work with specific origins lmao. That's about it its just a required mod for another mod and I am gonna keep yapping so modrinth moderators will approve this and not mark me for too short of a description this time (lmao hi modrinth moderators)
